hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'scripts/.*\.py$' && cd /home/user/frus-subject-taxonomy && python3 -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'build_candidates_review\.py$' && cd /home/user/frus-subject-taxonomy && python3 scripts/build_candidates_review.py --category all 2>&1 || true; }
